message.content:
@startuml
package solid
    as solid

    package interfacesegregation
        as interfacesegregation

        package badexample
            as badexample

            class AContainer
                as AContainer
                AContainer()
                doYourContainerStuffToMe()

            class AMachine
                as AMachine
                AMachine()
                doSomeWork()

            class MUser
                as MUser
                MUser()
                doYourOperations()

            class Operations
                as Operations
                operation1()
                operation2()
                operation3()

            AContainer ..> Operations : ops
            AMachine ..> Operations : ops
            MUser ..> Operations : ops

@enduml
